items.item: Expose a VaultFront readiness endpoint that reports health, test surfaces, free-tier posture, AI cost guardrails, provenance, and launch gates.
items.recipe: Add buildVaultFrontReadiness() and serve /api/vaultfront/readiness from master and worker so deploy and playtest checks have one machine-readable launch contract.

items.item: Turn TournamentModal from a passive bracket viewer into an operator-ready tournament console.
items.recipe: Add Seed Bracket and per-match Win controls wired to existing tournament APIs so an internal playtest can run a full bracket without raw API calls.

items.item: Fix the startup brief's missing testing-surface signal for this game repo.
items.recipe: Add concrete testingSurfaces, type, readiness endpoint, and current milestone posture to context/PROJECT_STATUS.json.

items.item: Make the pre-revenue cost posture explicit before AI and tournament features invite usage.
items.recipe: Record exempt-internal free-tier status, live revenue warning, and readiness evidence so the next promotion cannot miss the cost/revenue gap.

skipped.reason: VaultFront already has several AI systems; current blocker is launch measurement and cost discipline, not more generation surface.
The startup gaps are operational and tournament-flow readiness; broad UI redesign would dilute this session.

executionLog.summary: Added shared readiness payload, master/worker routes, and focused tests.
Added Seed Bracket and per-match Win controls to TournamentModal.
Registered concrete testing surfaces and project type in PROJECT_STATUS.
Recorded exempt-internal cost posture and live revenue warning.
